issues.title: Canvas has no text alternative or fallback
issues.fix:
Added role=application, aria-label, and fallback

inside canvas

issues.title: Canvas interactive content not keyboard accessible
issues.fix: Added tabindex=0 and role=application to canvas element

issues.title: Muted gray text on dark backgrounds fails contrast
issues.fix: Brightened #4a4a66 to #8a8aa4, #5a5a78 to #7a7a96, #6a6a88 to #7a7a96, #4a5a7a to #7a8a9a for all text elements in CSS and JS inline styles

issues.title: Tour settings inputs missing associated labels
issues.fix: Changed span.narr-setting-label to label elements with for attributes; added aria-label to all inputs

issues.title: No skip navigation link
issues.fix: Added visually-hidden skip link before nav that targets #main-area

issues.title: Glossary uses div/span instead of semantic list
issues.note: JS-generated in buildGlossary() in app.js — changing to ul/li risks breaking layout and interaction patterns

issues.title: Focus indicators rely on browser default
issues.fix: Added *:focus-visible rule with 2px solid #7aaaee outline; removed all outline:none declarations from inputs

issues.title: Close buttons use x character without aria-label
issues.fix: Added aria-label to glossary-close, info-close, and glossary-search-clear buttons

issues.title: Tab order follows DOM not visual layout
issues.note: Canvas-heavy app with overlays — reordering tab flow requires extensive testing of all interactive states

issues.title: Info panel facts should use dl/dt/dd
issues.note: JS-generated in showInfo() in app.js — converting info-stat divs to dl/dt/dd requires careful refactoring

issues.title: Page title does not update to reflect current view
issues.note: Would need JS changes to updateHash/navigation functions to update document.title dynamically

issues.title: Input/slider borders may fail non-text contrast
issues.fix: Changed form input borders from #2a2a44 to #4a4a66 for feedback, narration settings, and glossary search

issues.title: Landmark regions missing (main, nav)
issues.fix: Wrapped top-bar in <nav> with aria-label; added role=main to #main-area

issues.title: No prefers-reduced-motion for animations
issues.fix: Added @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) that neutralizes all transitions and animations

issues.title: Font sizes in px not rem/em
issues.note: Converting all px font sizes to rem touches nearly every CSS rule — large refactor

issues.title: Viewport meta disables user scaling
issues.fix: Removed maximum-scale=1.0 and user-scalable=no from viewport meta tag

issues.title: Decorative elements not aria-hidden
issues.fix: Added aria-hidden=true to all .key-hint spans and .sun-icon span
